Digrro Academy

Premium AI training for marketing, content, and media teams that want sharper work, faster delivery, and better creative systems.

Digrro Academy helps marketers, creators, social media teams, and video professionals use AI for campaign ideation, content planning, Arabic copywriting, short-form video creation, and editing workflows that improve quality without slowing the team down.

Explore Programs Talk to an Advisor
Live cohort training, private team delivery, Arabic or bilingual facilitation, and certificate pathways for structured programs.
Arabic / English delivery Templates included Account-linked checkout
Live training Instructor-led sessions with real demos, exercises, and direct feedback.
Real use cases Built for campaign teams, content teams, creators, editors, and agencies.
Useful assets Prompt packs, workflow templates, and practical implementation guidance.

Why teams choose Digrro Academy

  • Built for real marketing, content, and media execution rather than generic AI theory.
  • Clear training plans for individuals, teams, and corporate departments.
  • Arabic, English, or bilingual delivery depending on your audience and team mix.
  • Fast enrollment for public plans and tailored consultation for private programs.

What makes the training practical

  • Faster campaign ideation, copywriting, and content planning using structured AI workflows.
  • Better short-form video systems through AI-assisted scripting, editing, captions, and repurposing.
  • Reusable prompt packs and workflow templates that teams can apply immediately.
  • Clearer internal processes for producing high-volume content without losing quality.
Who it is for

Designed for teams and professionals who turn ideas into campaigns, content, and video

If your work depends on content production, creative speed, campaign execution, or better video output, Digrro Academy is built to help you use AI in a way that strengthens the work you already do instead of replacing your process with hype.

In-house marketing teams

For companies that want faster content planning, sharper campaign ideas, better copy, and repeatable AI workflows inside the team.

Agencies and social media teams

For agencies managing multiple brands, frequent campaign production, client content calendars, and short-form creative at scale.

Creators and video editors

For professionals who want to use AI for scripts, storyboards, captions, voice, editing support, and faster content repurposing.

Corporate teams and departments

For organizations that want structured AI adoption, role-based training, and custom workflows for marketing and media teams.

Training plans

Choose the training plan that fits your team and budget

Transparent pricing in USD. Create your academy login before checkout so your payment and learning status stay linked to your email.

Offer 01

AI Marketing Sprint

4 Hours Live Workshop

A fast, live workshop for marketers and content teams who want a practical introduction to AI for campaign thinking, content planning, copywriting, and creative workflow acceleration.

$200
Per seat public cohort or $1,750 for a private team workshop
Best entry point for fast team upskilling and pilot delivery.
  • AI prompting for campaign and content work
  • Idea generation, offers, hooks, and planning
  • Arabic and bilingual content workflow examples
  • Quick-start prompt pack and templates
Pay with Wise
Best for teams that want a fast start without committing to a long program.
Most scalable
Offer 02

AI Content and Video Bootcamp

4 Weeks 8 Live Sessions

A deeper bootcamp for marketers, creators, and editors who want to build real AI workflows for content production, short-form video, repurposing, and execution from idea to final output.

$650
Early-bird per seat, $850 standard price
Best value for professionals who want end-to-end capability, not just a quick introduction.
  • 8 live sessions with guided assignments
  • AI workflows for content systems and operations
  • AI video scripting, editing, captions, and repurposing
  • Capstone project and certificate pathway
Pay with Wise
Best for professionals who want a fuller skill set and portfolio-ready output.
Offer 03

Corporate Academy Program

Private Delivery Custom Agenda

A custom training package for companies that want to upskill internal teams, standardize AI use, and build practical workflows for marketing, content, and media operations.

From $4,800
For teams up to 15 participants, with premium custom option at $7,500
Ideal for departments that need team-wide adoption, consistency, and management buy-in.
  • Discovery and role-based customization
  • Private team sessions and implementation guidance
  • Prompt packs, templates, and SOP handoff
  • Management-friendly rollout support
Pay with Wise
Best for companies that want team-wide enablement instead of a public cohort seat.
What your team will master

Skills built inside the academy

  • AI prompting for campaign planning, research, and content execution.
  • Faster creation of offers, hooks, ad copy, captions, and content calendars.
  • AI-assisted script writing, short-form video planning, and editing workflows.
  • Practical review methods to keep content on-brand, accurate, and usable.
  • Stronger team workflows for repeatable AI-supported output.
What every participant gets

More than just sessions

  • Live instruction with exercises, demos, and applied assignments.
  • Prompt packs, templates, and workflow examples ready to use after training.
  • Program materials built around marketing, content, and media execution.
  • Certificate of completion for eligible learners in the structured programs.
Wise payment

Secure your seat with Wise

Public academy offers can be paid online through Wise. If you are booking for a company, a private team, or need invoice-based payment, talk to Digrro and we will guide you through the right option.

  • Choose a public plan above and continue to payment after creating your academy login.
  • Your enrollment will be linked to the same email you register with at checkout.
  • For team training, private workshops, or custom delivery, contact Digrro directly.
Choose a public plan above and continue to payment when you are ready.
Need a team package?

Private and corporate training is available

If you want private delivery for your company, department, or client team, Digrro can prepare a tailored agenda, delivery format, and commercial proposal based on your exact training needs.

Arabic, English, and bilingual delivery options are available.

Request Team Proposal
FAQ

Questions buyers usually ask before paying

Who should join Digrro Academy?

The programs are designed for marketers, content teams, social media managers, creators, editors, and companies that want practical AI adoption.

Do I need a technical background?

No. The training focuses on execution and workflows for business, content, and media work rather than coding.

Can the training be delivered in Arabic and English?

Yes. Digrro Academy can be delivered in Arabic, English, or bilingual format depending on the audience.

How will my payment stay linked to my registration?

The academy flow is designed to create your login first, store your enrollment under the same email, and then send you to Wise checkout. Your registration and follow-up are tied to that email address.
